response:
SELECT airport_code FROM (
    SELECT airport_code, COUNT(*) AS total_flights
    FROM (
        SELECT origin_airport_code AS airport_code FROM flight_2.flights
        UNION ALL
        SELECT destination_airport_code AS airport_code FROM flight_2.flights
    ) AS all_flight_airports
    GROUP BY airport_code
    ORDER BY total_flights ASC
    FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
);
